packages.label: ICS Calendar Snapshot
packages.description: Local snapshot calendar surface backed by an operator-provided .ics file path.

packages.label: RSS News Feeds
packages.description: Read-only headline and intelligence surfaces backed by configured RSS/news feed aggregation rather than direct account control.

packages.label: Shopify Store Intelligence
packages.description: Tier 1 read-only Shopify store intelligence via the Shopify GraphQL Admin API. Fetches order metrics, product catalog, and inventory status. No write scopes. Credentials held in env vars for dev; governed identity layer recommended for production.
